titleZh: 中国公司法迎来重要修订
titleEn: China Makes Welcome Amendments to Its Company Law
abstractZh: 概览2023年新《公司法》的核心修订方向，重点包括公司登记、资本缴付、治理结构和董监高责任等影响面最广的制度变化。
abstractEn: Provides a firm-level overview of the key amendments to the revised PRC Company Law, with emphasis on registration, capital contribution, governance, and management liability.
